name: Progressive Context Injector
description: Agent-workspace-first progressive context injection for OpenClaw agents. Resolves agent workspace files and shared contexts, injects full content on first turn and compact reminders on later turns. Registers a workspace_context tool for on-demand file/section access.

standardWorkspaceFiles.description: Override default filenames for standard agent workspace file slots. Defaults: agents=AGENTS.md, soul=SOUL.md, user=USER.md, tools=TOOLS.md, memory=MEMORY.md, heartbeat=HEARTBEAT.md.

sharedContexts.description: Named shared context definitions. Each key is a human-readable alias, value defines the file path and metadata.

path.description: File path relative to workspace root.

description.description: Human-readable description of this shared context.

label.description: Optional classification label (pure metadata, never drives logic).

sections.description: Known section names within this context file.

compactText.description: Short summary text shown in compact reminders on turn 2+.

routeTable.description: Per-context route hints mapping topics to sections.

agents.description: Per-agent configuration. Use '*' for wildcard defaults. Agent-specific keys are merged on top of wildcard. Supports legacy fields for backward compat.

workspaceRoot.description: Agent workspace root relative to workspace root. Supports {agentId} template. Example: 'agents/{agentId}' or '.'.

workspaceFiles.description: Subset of standard workspace file keys to include. Example: ['agents', 'soul', 'user', 'tools'].

extraWorkspaceFiles.description: Extra agent-local files by semantic key -> filename.

injectSharedOnFirstTurn.description: Shared context IDs to inject in full on the first turn.

availableSharedContexts.description: Shared context IDs available on-demand via workspace_context tool but not auto-injected.

bootstrapKeep.description: Filenames to keep in full during bootstrap filtering.

bootstrapCompact.description: Map of filename to compact stub text. These files are replaced with a short summary during bootstrap.

routeTable.description: Topic -> target mapping. Targets use 'workspace:<key>' or 'shared:<name>' format. Shown in compact reminders and first-turn context.

firstTurnFiles.description: DEPRECATED: Use injectSharedOnFirstTurn instead. List of filenames to inject on first turn (legacy v2).

injectRoutingIndex.description: DEPRECATED: Use routeTable instead. If true, inject context routing index on first turn (legacy v2).

compactReminder.description: Custom compact reminder text prepended to the generated reminder on turn 2+. Mutually exclusive with compactReminderFile.

compactReminderFile.description: Path to a file containing custom compact reminder text, relative to workspace root.

skipAgents.description: List of agent IDs to skip entirely (no injection, no bootstrap filtering).

bootstrapDedup.description: Enable same-name file deduplication during bootstrap. Defaults to true.

sharedDir.description: DEPRECATED: Use agents[*].workspaceRoot instead. Directory containing shared context files.

globalFiles.description: DEPRECATED: Use sharedContexts instead. Map of file IDs to filenames for global reference files.

agentFiles.description: DEPRECATED: Use standardWorkspaceFiles + agents[].workspaceFiles instead. Map of file IDs to per-agent filenames.

contextRoutingIndex.description: DEPRECATED: Use agents[].routeTable instead. Inline context routing index text.

contextRoutingIndexFile.description: DEPRECATED: Use agents[].routeTable instead. Path to routing index file.
